💳 AP — Carrier Payment Sheet
Upload monthly/weekly carrier payment sheet (.xlsx or .csv). Auto-runs reconciliation across all dashboards.
📥 AR — Customer Payment Sheet
Upload AR sheet (.xlsx or .csv). All month tabs are merged automatically.
Assign Branches to Teams

Loaded Files

FileTeamLoadsMonths CoveredLoaded

How to update monthly

  1. In Ascend, export your loads report — include Pickups, Deliveries, Customer, Carrier, Branch, Total Income, Total Expenses, Gross Profit/Loss, Invoice Sent Date, Invoice Payment Dates, Invoice Balance, Equipment, First Pick State, Carrier MC Number
  2. Click + Add CSV in the sidebar or drop the file above
  3. Optionally type a Team name before uploading to group by team
  4. Data merges — no duplicates, no re-uploading old months needed
  5. Everything auto-saves in your browser between sessions
